name: Caffeine
summary: A well-supported performance aid: acutely improves strength, power, and training capacity, which can indirectly support hypertrophy by improving session quality. Not directly anabolic.
effect: Small acute improvements in muscular strength, power, and endurance; reduced perceived exertion. Benefits are performance-mediated, not a direct muscle-growth effect.
dosing: ~3-6 mg/kg bodyweight ~30-60 minutes before training. Habitual users may see smaller effects.
timing: Pre-workout (unlike most supplements, timing matters here).
safety: Generally safe at recommended doses; can disrupt sleep if taken later in the day and cause jitters/GI upset in sensitive users. Mind total daily intake.
